omitted_declarations.policy_reference: investigation/ suppoеnа / Court order requesting to share any available in the system data, Zangi will share the following data of the suspected in the crime user: registration date, account deletion date, last login date, name completed in the profile, Bio, Premium subscription status, subscription transaction ID, subscription/renewal date, device model, device platform and operating system version, push token, Device ID, which is the real Device ID for Android and system generated for iOS. If the user is an old user who has signed in via email/phone number, also the sign-in email /phone number will be provided. Users with Zangi virtual numbers starting with 10 DO NOT have any assigned email or phone number. Authority requests supported by duly served supporting documents must be sent to legal@zangi.com

You agree that we may collect and use technical data and related information, including but not limited to technical information about Your mobile device, system and application software, and peripherals, that is gathered periodically to facilitate the provision of software updates, product support and other services to You (if any) related to the Licensed Application. We may use this information, as long as it is in a form that does not personally identify You, to improve our Services offered to You (for further information on our privacy policy click here).

3.3 Registration data and technical identifiers. On sign-up the app assigns the user a country code, push token and device ID, as well as gets your device type and / or model, operating system and Zangi app version. All listed in section 3.3 data is securely stored on servers and is used for technical and support purposes unless otherwise required by law.

3.3 Registration data and technical identifiers.
